title: Zindagi Ke Safar Mein Guzar Jaate Hain Jo Maqam
info: Movie: Dil Apna Aur Preet Parai

lines.indian: Sa (Ni) Sa Ga — Ma Pa — Ni —
Ni Sa — — (Ni) (Dha) Pa — Ma — Ga Ma Dha — Ga —
Pa — — Ma Ga Sa (Ni) Dha Re —
Pa — — Ma Ga Sa (Ni) Re — Sa —

lines.lyrics: Phool khilte hain log milte hain
lines.indian: Ga Ma Ga Re Ma — (Ga) — Ga Ma Ga Re Ma — (Ga) —

lines.lyrics: Phool khilte hain log milte hain magar
lines.indian: Ga Ma Ga Re Sa Ma Ga Ga Ga, Ga Ma Ga Re Sa Ma Ga Ga Ga

lines.lyrics: Patjhad mein jo phool murjha jaate hain
lines.indian: Ma (Ga) Ma Ma Ga, Ma Ma Ga, Ga Ma Dha Pa Ma Ga —

lines.lyrics: Woh baharon ke aane se khilte nahi
lines.indian: Ma Ga Ma Dha Dha, Dha Sa Ni Pa — Ni — Dha Pa —

lines.lyrics: Kuch log ek roz jo bichhad jaate hain
lines.indian: Pa Ma Pa — Pa — Ma Pa — Pa — Ma Ma Dha Pa — Ma — Ga —

lines.lyrics: Woh hazaron ke aane se milte nahi
lines.indian: Ma Ga Ma Dha Dha, Dha Sa Ni Pa — Ni — Dha Pa —
